global_description: Large reptile with elongated body, rough scaly skin, predominantly green or brown, powerful tail, short legs, long snout with sharp teeth, and prominent ridges along the back.

part_details.head: Long snout with sharp teeth, small eyes on top
part_details.body: Elongated, covered in rough scales, green or brown
part_details.tail: Long and powerful, tapering to a point
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, with clawed feet

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail extending behind
